disclosure_item: Has the balance sheet date (Bilanzstichtag) been disclosed? (Jahresabschlussstichtag)
evidence: Page 1: Bilanzstichtag 31.12.2023 disclosed

disclosure_item: Has the legal form (Rechtsform) of the entity been disclosed? (Rechtsform)
evidence: Legal form GmbH disclosed in header

disclosure_item: Has the company's registered office (Sitz der Gesellschaft) been disclosed? (Sitz der Gesellschaft)
evidence: Page 1: Schwäbisch Gmünd disclosed as registered office

disclosure_item: Has the company's object (Unternehmensgegenstand) been disclosed? (Gegenstand des Unternehmens)
evidence: Page 1: HiFi-Produkte described in Lagebericht

disclosure_item: Has a list of managing directors (Geschäftsführer) with names been disclosed? (Name(n) der Geschäftsführer)
evidence: Page 7: Geschäftsführer Günther Nubert, Markus Pedal, Daniel T. Schütze disclosed

disclosure_item: Has membership of the Gesellschafterversammlung been disclosed? (Gesellschafter)
evidence: Forderungen gegen Gesellschafter disclosed - shows shareholder relationship

disclosure_item: Have the members of the supervisory board (Aufsichtsrat) been disclosed? (Mitglieder des Aufsichtsrats)
evidence: No Aufsichtsrat - not required for GmbH under 500 employees

disclosure_item: Has the entity claimed the §288 Abs. 2 exemption from certain §285 disclosures? (Kleinunternehmerprivileg)
evidence: Exempt for medium GmbH per §288 Abs. 2 HGB

disclosure_item: If §288 Abs. 2 exemption is claimed, has the entity met the size criteria? (Größenkriterien)
evidence: Exempt for medium GmbH per §288 Abs. 2 HGB

disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the exercise of the 5-year exemption option for medium companies? (Fünf-Jahres-Befreiung)
evidence: Exempt for medium GmbH per §288 Abs. 2 HGB
